title: Ethrium
description: An extensive data pack that adds new dimensions, biomes, weapons, items, and structures.
body:
## Ethrium has been discontinued and is no longer available to download.

I have lost motivation to work on this project and it was far to unstable to continue it anyways. Sorry for any inconvenience. To delete from your world please use the Ethrium Uninstallation Pack or Dimensions Fix Pack.
